creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Sorry for the mistake. And to be truth you do not need maintainer-approval for such fixing cases. Just commit it with:

Approved by: portmgr (just-fix-it)

One more thing is please check existing PRs. :D

As the maintainer is AFK as mentioned in the bug # 276990 feel free to commit it giving proper credit to the other reporter.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 276990 ***
